ItacAcademyItem.Name: Accesi-Mantova (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Luigi Carnoli published an oration in honour of the academy`s foundation titled Oratio in erectione Academiae Accensorum Mantuae (Bologna: Benatii, 1655). Although no trace of this volume can be found, it is mentioned in Martin Lipenius`s Biblioteca realis philosophica (Frankfort, 1682), Melzi`s Dizionario and Maylender`s Storia. The academy might be related tenuously to the Accesi commedia dell`arte troupe led by Tristano Martinelli (ca. 1555-1630) and Pier Maria Cecchini (1563-1645), although both these figures were dead before the academy`s foundation.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
